name: prizm
description: prizm — a TRIZ multi-matrix workshop plugin for Claude Code. Refracts one problem through multiple TRIZ matrices (engineering, biomimetic, healthcare-service-quality, AI-extended, bilingual) and preserves their distinct framings instead of collapsing them. Multi-agent pipeline with structurally-blinded mapping critic.

plugins.name: prizm
plugins.description: Frame a problem as a TRIZ contradiction → select the best-fitting matrix from 9 bundled options → map contradiction to parameters with a structurally-blinded independent critic → look up inventive principles → expand into concrete solutions → stress-test for secondary contradictions. Every step writes an auditable JSON artifact. Runs are replayable.
